SEQUENCE.COMMENT: z_updateActiveStep - set the transaction's current step within its workflow
1. logs ---STEPnn--- in the activity log file

INVOKE.COMMENT: Setting current transaction workflow step to %transactionStep%

Values.value: Setting current transaction workflow step to %transactionStep%

MAP.COMMENT: UPDATE TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE SET CURRENT_WORKFLOW_STEP = '%transactionStep%' WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

Values.value: UPDATE TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE SET CURRENT_WORKFLOW_STEP = '%transactionStep%' WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

INVOKE.NAME: sRows <> 1
INVOKE.COMMENT: Warning: unable to update TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE, sRows='%sRows%'

Values.value: Warning: unable to update TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE, sRows='%sRows%'

MAP.COMMENT: INSERT INTO TFW_TRANS_STEPS VALUES ('%sFwTransactionid%', TRANSACTION_STEPS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, '%instanceSpec%', '%sTid%', SYSTIMESTAMP, '%transactionStep%', 'NewStep', 'New step is starting')

Values.value: INSERT INTO TFW_TRANS_STEPS VALUES ( '%sFwTransactionid%', TRANSACTION_STEPS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, '%instanceSpec%', '%sTid%', to_char(SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZR'), '%transactionStep%', 'NewStep', 'New step is starting' )

INVOKE.NAME: sRows <> 1
INVOKE.COMMENT: Warning: unable to insert into TFW_TRANS_STEPS, sRows='%sRows%'

Values.value: Warning: unable to insert into TFW_TRANS_STEPS, sRows='%sRows%'
